description:
This image is a screenshot displaying two main user interface elements: a file save dialog and a task completion notification. The top portion shows a Windows file save dialog titled "Bitte geben Sie den Dateinamen an, unter dem die Datei gespeichert werden soll..." (Please enter the file name under which the file should be saved...). The current location is "Dieser PC > Downloads". Quick access shortcuts are visible, including "Downloads" and several folders like "30574_EU_EEA_CLC+Core" and "30715_EEA_CLC+_Instances". The file list shows recent `.zip` files such as "18447.zip" (26.10.2023 13:41) and "17122.zip" (23.10.2023 07:41). The "Dateiname:" (File name:) field is pre-filled with "19239.zip", and "Dateityp:" (File type:) is "WinRAR-ZIP-Archiv (*.zip)".

The bottom portion displays a "Completed" task box. It shows "Task ID: 8337912519", with a "Start date: 26.10.2023 07.11" and "End date: 28.10.2023 04.37". The task description reads: "Urban Atlas Land Cover/Land Use 2018 (vector), Europe, 6-yearly - Pre-packaged". A "Download file (44.9 MB) | Expires in 1 days" link is also visible, indicating that the completed task involves a downloadable data product.
